original_question: A very special island is inhabited only by knights and knaves. Knights always tell the truth, and knaves always lie. You meet 4 inhabitants: Amelia, Aiden, Logan, and Elizabeth. Amelia noted, "Elizabeth is a knave or Logan is a knight". According to Aiden, "Logan is a knave". Logan said that Amelia is a knight if and only if Elizabeth is a knave. Elizabeth said that Aiden is a knight. So who is a knight and who is a knave?

similar_questions.question: On a mysterious island, only knights and knaves reside. Knights always tell the truth, while knaves always lie. You encounter 5 inhabitants: Mia, Liam, Noah, and Sophia. Mia stated, "Sophia is a knave or Noah is a knight". According to Liam, "Noah is a knave". Noah claimed that Mia is a knight if and only if Sophia is a knave. Sophia stated that Liam is a knight. Determine who is a knight and who is a knave.

On an enchanted island, all inhabitants are either knights or knaves. Knights tell the truth, and knaves always lie. You come across 6 inhabitants: Ethan, Olivia, Ava, and Jackson. Ethan remarked, "Olivia is a knave or Ava is a knight". According to Jackson, "Ava is a knave". Olivia said that Ethan is a knight if and only if Ava is a knave. Ava declared that Jackson is a knight. Who is a knight and who is a knave?

On a peculiar island, the only inhabitants are knights and knaves. Knights always tell the truth, while knaves consistently lie. You meet 3 inhabitants: Chloe, Oliver, and Isabella. Chloe observed, "Isabella is a knave or Oliver is a knight". Oliver claimed, "Isabella is a knave". Isabella stated that Chloe is a knight if and only if Oliver is a knave. Determine who is a knight and who is a knave.

On a secretive island, populated solely by knights and knaves, knights are always truthful, and knaves always deceive. You encounter 4 inhabitants: Ella, Mason, Lucas, and Grace. Ella mentioned, "Grace is a knave or Mason is a knight". Mason declared, "Lucas is a knave". Lucas claimed that Ella is a knight if and only if Grace is a knave. Grace stated that Mason is a knight. Identify the knights and knaves.

On a strange island, inhabited exclusively by knights and knaves, knights always tell the truth, while knaves always lie. You meet 5 inhabitants: Ava, Benjamin, Charlotte, and Henry. Ava asserted, "Charlotte is a knave or Benjamin is a knight". Benjamin said, "Charlotte is a knave". Charlotte noted that Ava is a knight if and only if Henry is a knave. Henry indicated that Benjamin is a knight. Who is a knight and who is a knave?
